basic_details.job_title: Balasore District Court Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 48 Junior Clerk, Steno and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Junior Clerk & Copyist, Stenographer Gr.-III, Junior Typist
basic_details.short_information: Balasore District Court has published the Junior Clerk & Copyist, Stenographer Gr.-III, and Junior Typist Recruitment 2026 notification on the official website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 48 vacancies for various court posts. Candidates within the age range of 18 to 42 years and holding qualifications such as a Graduate Degree with Diploma in Computer Application and required Shorthand & Typewriting skills are eligible to apply for these posts. The application process will remain active until 07 August 2026 through offline mode, and candidates can access the notification PDF and applic

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age Relaxation: As per rules for SC/ST/SEBC, Women, Ex-Servicemen, and Physically Handicapped candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate, Diploma in Computer Application, Shorthand & Typewriting speed
qualification.details: Citizen of India +3 examination or equivalent Diploma in Computer Application Ability to read, write and speak Oriya and pass a test in Oriya equivalent to M.E. Standard Good character Sound health, good physique and free from organic defects or bodily infirmity Not more than one spouse living, if married No criminal proceeding pending | Minimum speed of 40 words per minute in type writing | Minimum speed of 80 words per minute in shorthand and 40 words per minute in type writing

salary_details.details: Junior Clerk & Copyist: Rs. 19,900-63,200/- per month Stenographer Gr.-III: Rs. 25,500-81,100/- per month Junior Typist: Rs. 19,900-63,200/- per month Plus usual DA and other allowances.

selection_process: Computer Science Test) Viva Voce Test Shorthand & Typewriting Test (for Stenographer Grade III) Typewriting Test (for Junior Typist)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Balasore District Court Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://balasore.dcourts.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 07-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Balasore District Court Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Balasore District Court Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Balasore District Court Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Balasore District Court Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
Balasore District Court Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Citizen of India +3 examination or equivalent Diploma in Computer Application Ability to read, write and speak Oriya and pass a test in Oriya equivalent to M.E. Standard Good character Sound health, good physique and free from organic defects or bodily infirmity Not more than one spouse living, if married No criminal proceeding pending Minimum speed of 40 words per minute in type writing Minimum speed of 80 words per minute in shorthand and 40 words per minute in type writing

content_sections.heading: Balasore District Court Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee

rows.category: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Balasore District Court Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age Relaxation: As per rules for SC/ST/SEBC, Women, Ex-Servicemen, and Physically Handicapped candidates.

content_sections.heading: Balasore District Court Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Junior Clerk & Copyist: Rs. 19,900-63,200/- per month Stenographer Gr.-III: Rs. 25,500-81,100/- per month Junior Typist: Rs. 19,900-63,200/- per month Plus usual DA and other allowances.

content_sections.heading: Balasore District Court Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date of Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: Balasore District Court Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Written Test (English, Arithmetic, General Knowledge, Computer Science Test) Viva Voce Test Shorthand & Typewriting Test (for Stenographer Grade III) Typewriting Test (for Junior Typist)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Balasore District Court Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: http://balasore.dcourts.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 07-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Balasore District Court Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Balasore District Court recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Balasore District Court recruitment is 07-08-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 48 vacancies announced for the posts of Junior Clerk & Copyist, Stenographer Gr.-III, and Junior Typist in the Balasore District Court.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum educational qualification required?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification is a +3 examination or equivalent, along with a Diploma in Computer Application. Specific typing and shorthand skills are also required for certain posts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The age limit for applicants is between 18 to 42 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their applications via Speed Post or Registered Post to the specified address.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for these posts?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 19,900-63,200/- to Rs. 25,500-81,100/- per month, plus usual Dearness Allowance and other allowances.

faq.question: Q7. What are the different posts available for recruitment?
faq.answer: The available posts are Junior Clerk & Copyist, Stenographer Gr.-III, and Junior Typist.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test, Viva Voce Test, and for specific posts, a Shorthand & Typewriting Test or Typewriting Test.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Balasore District Court, the link for which is provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q10. What is the address to send the application form?
faq.answer: The application form should be sent to 'REGISTRAR, CIVIL COURTS, BALASORE, AT/PO/PS/DIST.- BALASORE, PIN CODE-756001'.
